questions.question: Who is the PM owner of NovaAI's flagship product?
questions.ground_truth_answer: Fatima Al-Rashid is the PM owner of NovaPilot, NovaAI's flagship product.

questions.question: Who leads the UX/Design team, and when did they join NovaAI?
questions.ground_truth_answer: Lena Park leads the UX/Design team and joined NovaAI in June 2022.

questions.question: Who leads the SMB Sales team, and what is their FY2026 quota?
questions.ground_truth_answer: Tanya Osei leads the SMB Sales team, and her FY2026 quota is $6M.

questions.question: When did NovaAI's Chief Revenue Officer join the company?
questions.ground_truth_answer: Dominique Leblanc, NovaAI's Chief Revenue Officer, joined the company in June 2022.

questions.question: When did NovaAI's VP of Marketing join the company?
questions.ground_truth_answer: Rachel Huang, NovaAI's VP of Marketing, joined the company in January 2023.

questions.question: Who is NovaBridge's Developer Relations Lead, and to whom do they report?
questions.ground_truth_answer: Priya Osei is NovaBridge's Developer Relations Lead, and she reports to the VP of Marketing.

questions.question: When did NovaAI's VP of Product join the company?
questions.ground_truth_answer: Oliver Haines, NovaAI's VP of Product, joined the company in March 2022.

questions.question: What is the FY2026 NRR target of the department led by NovaAI's VP of Customer Success?
questions.ground_truth_answer: Customer Success, the department led by VP of Customer Success Amara Diallo, has an FY2026 NRR target of 118%.

questions.question: Which product has a roadmap for real-time streaming via Kafka, and what type of product is it?
questions.ground_truth_answer: NovaLens has a roadmap for real-time streaming via Kafka, and it is a Predictive Analytics Engine.

questions.question: Who leads the Solutions Engineering team, and when did they join NovaAI?
questions.ground_truth_answer: Wei Zhang leads the Solutions Engineering team and joined NovaAI in April 2023.
